task_objective: Fix Nullity Matrix/Heatmap rendering and missingness in 20M report
design_decisions: Updated parseMatrixData in default.html to handle triple-nested JSON structures recursively (reportData.missing.matrix.matrix.values).
Fixed a bug where some nested matrices were not correctly identified by the React frontend.
Modified the 20M financial data script to ensure multiple columns have missing values, which is required to trigger the Pearson Nullity Heatmap.
Deleted and regenerated the 20M row Parquet file to ensure the new missingness data was persisted.
results: The Nullity Matrix and Nullity Heatmap now correctly compute and render in the 20M transaction report.
